name: m1_diff_capture_on_clean
description: With capture_diffs on, a clean FILE_CHANGE diff is scrubbed (no-op here) and written to the diff sidecar; the thin-log carries only a diff_ref, never the diff body.

events.diff:
diff --git a/throughlog/app.py b/throughlog/app.py
--- a/throughlog/app.py
+++ b/throughlog/app.py
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 import os
+greet = 1
